title: Blackstone Ribeye with Beef Tallow
steps: Pat the ribeye dry and salt both sides.
Heat the Blackstone until the surface is very hot.
Melt beef tallow on the cooking surface.
Sear the steak for 3 to 5 minutes per side, depending on thickness.
Rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
notes: Use the thermometer for consistency. Pull the steak a little before your target doneness because carryover heat will continue cooking it.

title: Crispy Beef Patties
steps: Divide the beef into small loose balls.
Heat the skillet with beef tallow until hot.
Press each beef ball into a thin patty.
Cook until the edges are deeply browned, then flip once.
Salt again to taste and serve hot.
notes: A firm press gives more browned edges. Avoid moving the patties too early.

title: Soft Scrambled Eggs with Butter
steps: Whisk eggs with salt until evenly mixed.
Melt butter over low heat.
Add eggs and stir slowly with a spatula.
Remove from heat while the eggs still look glossy.
Rest for 30 seconds before serving.
notes: Low heat gives a softer texture and reduces browning.

title: Pork Belly Bites
steps: Cut pork belly into bite-size cubes.
Salt the pieces on all sides.
Air fry at 190 C for 25 to 30 minutes.
Shake the basket halfway through cooking.
Rest for 3 minutes before serving.
notes: Cook time depends on cube size. Smaller pieces crisp faster.

title: Salmon in Butter
steps: Salt the salmon on all sides.
Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Cook the salmon skin-side down until the skin crisps.
Flip and baste with butter until just cooked through.
Rest briefly before serving.
notes: Keep the heat moderate so the butter browns without burning.

title: Carnivore Flatbread
reason_not_strict: Uses dairy and a bread-style format for convenience.
steps: Heat the oven to 190 C.
Blend eggs, cream cheese, pork rind crumbs, and salt until smooth.
Spread thinly on a parchment-lined sheet pan.
Bake for 18 to 22 minutes until set and lightly browned.
Cool for 5 minutes before cutting.
notes: Use as a base for simple meat toppings or cut into strips.

title: Carnivore Burger Buns
reason_not_strict: Uses dairy and a bun-style format for convenience.
steps: Heat the oven to 180 C.
Mix all ingredients until thick and even.
Divide into a greased muffin-top pan.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes until firm.
Cool before slicing.
notes: Best used the same day. Toast cut sides in beef tallow for more structure.

title: Carnivore Vanilla Ice Cream
steps: Warm cream and salt in a saucepan until steaming.
Whisk egg yolks in a bowl.
Slowly whisk warm cream into the yolks.
Return to low heat and stir until lightly thickened.
Chill, then churn in an ice cream maker.
notes: This is unsweetened. Add only ingredients that fit your own version of the recipe.

title: Egg Yolk Custard
reason_not_strict: Includes cream and butter, which are dairy.
steps: Whisk yolks and salt until smooth.
Warm cream over low heat.
Temper the yolks with the warm cream.
Return to low heat and stir until thickened.
Whisk in butter and portion into ramekins.
notes: Keep the heat low and stir constantly to avoid scrambling the yolks.

title: Mascarpone Cream Bowl
steps: Add mascarpone, cream, and salt to a cold bowl.
Whisk until thick and spoonable.
Serve immediately or chill for 15 minutes.
notes: Keep the bowl cold for a thicker texture.
